strengths: 16+ years of full-stack engineering experience building platforms at scale, with recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and developer tooling

Proven ability to architect and implement large-scale distributed systems (millions of requests/second) with hands-on expertise in cloud technologies, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and infrastructure optimization
Strong engineering leadership track record through staff-level roles, mentoring, and community engagement (workshops, open source platforms, speaking engagements)
concerns: No formal AI/ML credentials (Master's/PhD in AI field) and lacks demonstrated products or platforms recognized for AI expertise despite current infrastructure work
Resume emphasizes hands-on implementation and technical breadth over strategic advisory; limited evidence of external customer or partner advisory on technology adoption
Career shows technical versatility across domains but lacks deep specialization in AI/ML strategy expected for Director-level AI-focused principal engineer role

key_factors.factor: Platform and infrastructure engineering at scale
Strategic advisory and external thought leadership

response.justification: Bogdan brings solid engineering fundamentals with 16+ years of experience and proven ability to design, build, and scale complex platforms across infrastructure and emerging technologies. His current work with AI-agent infrastructure demonstrates engagement with the AI domain. However, the principal engineer role specifically prioritizes deep AI/ML expertise and strategic thought leadership. The resume lacks formal AI credentials (Master's/PhD) or demonstrated products establishing recognized AI expertise—key preferences for this AI Strategy role. While his engineering leadership is evident, the strategic advisory component (advising customers and partners on AI adoption) is underrepresented relative to his implementation-focused background.
